title: Stash persistence to disk + size cap
problem: The shared stash lives only in Zustand memory and is wiped on app restart. There is no size limit — the stash can grow unboundedly, which will cause performance issues and makes it feel undesigned. Both issues must be solved together since adding a cap without persistence creates frustrating item loss.

lineage.spawnReason: bug + deferred mechanic: stash data loss on restart is a bug; stash cap was a known omission from the initial implementation

analysis: sharedStash was already persisted to AsyncStorage via persistence.ts (SaveData.sharedStash). The actual gap was: (1) no size cap — stash could grow unboundedly, causing performance issues and no intentional design. (2) depositToStash() returned void and was never checked by callers — StashScreen.handleDeposit silently ignored overflow. Fix: add MAX_STASH_SIZE = 30 constant, make depositToStash() return boolean (false = full), enforce cap in the implementation, show 'Stash full' toast in StashScreen, update stash tab label to show count/cap.
implementation: 1. gameStore.ts: added MAX_STASH_SIZE = 30 exported constant. Changed depositToStash interface to return boolean. Implementation returns false early if sharedStash.length >= MAX_STASH_SIZE. 2. StashScreen.tsx: handleDeposit checks return value — shows 'Stash full (30 items max)' toast if false and returns without dropping the item. Tab label updated from '{count}' to '{count}/30'. 3. GridScreen.tsx: stake bonus item delivery now falls back to stash via depositToStash() if bag is full, then to a 'bag & stash full, item lost' warning toast if stash is also full.

decisions.rationale: Enough for a serious player to hold curated end-game gear across runs without becoming a hoard sim. Small enough to prevent performance issues with large serialized arrays.

decisions.decision: depositToStash returns boolean, callers responsible for toast
decisions.rationale: The store layer should not own toast/UI state. Each caller (StashScreen, GridScreen stake delivery) shows appropriate contextual feedback.

successCriteria: Depositing to a stash with 30 items shows a 'Stash full' toast and does not add the item. Stash tab shows 'count/30'. Stake bonus item falls through to stash if bag is full, then warns if both are full.
knownLimitations: equipFromStash does a 1-for-1 swap and bypasses the cap check (by design — stash size doesn't change during swaps)
unequipToStash bypasses the cap (uncommon edge case — equip slot unequip can push stash over 30)
userGuide: The stash holds up to 30 items and survives across all runs and deaths. Deposit items from StashScreen. When the stash is full, you'll see a toast and the item stays in your bag.
implementationNotes: MAX_STASH_SIZE exported from gameStore.ts — import it in any screen that needs the constant
Stash IS persisted already — the gap was only the size cap and caller feedback

publicInterface.name: MAX_STASH_SIZE
publicInterface.description: Maximum items in sharedStash. Exported from gameStore.ts.

publicInterface.name: depositToStash
publicInterface.description: Returns false if stash is at MAX_STASH_SIZE capacity.

codeSnippets.label: depositToStash with cap enforcement

revisions.author: claude
revisions.reason: Stash cap implemented this session — persistence was already there, cap was the missing piece
